mapper.select: SELECT res_id AS restId, res_name AS restName, address AS restAddress, representative_menu AS restMenu, menu_price AS restPrice, lat AS restLat, lon AS restLng, rest_views AS restViews FROM restaurant

SELECT res_id AS restId, res_name AS restName, address AS restAddress, representative_menu AS restMenu, menu_price AS restPrice, lat AS restLat, lon AS restLng, rest_views AS restViews, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_wish WHERE res_id = r.res_id AND is_wish = 1) AS wish_count FROM restaurant r

SELECT res_id as kakaoPlaceId, place_name as placeName, ROUND(IFNULL((SELECT AVG(rating) FROM place_stats WHERE res_id = t.res_id AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != ''), 0.0), 1) as avgRating,
IFNULL((SELECT SUM(view_count) FROM place_stats WHERE res_id = t.res_id), 0) as viewCount,
category, address, is_wish as liked,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_stats WHERE res_id = t.res_id AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != '') as reviewCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_stats WHERE res_id = t.res_id AND is_wish = 1) as heartCount FROM place_stats t WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_wish = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC
